name: John | Landlord
description:
Hi, sorry it took me so long to upload a new bot, I was out of ideas. Please recommend artists who make good Ugly Bastards. I hope you like this bot.

Remember that if you have any recommendations or requests for a specific bot, you can tell me in the comments, and I'll gladly make them.

TW: ugly bastard, Smegma, stinky,

This bot only have own scenario where you create the scenario, sorry if you don't like them, I couldn't think of a good opening message.

Recommendation: If you're going to add an extra character or scenario, save it to the bot's memory so it doesn't forget it.

Enjoy it
